results.rendered_html:
aupaniṣada 1〉 adj. f. ī in einer Upaniṣad enthalten, — gelehrt gaṇa ṛgayanādi zu  P. 4,3,73 . puruṣa  ŚAT. BR. 14,6,9,28  (fälschlich parox.). dhanurgṛhītvaupaniṣadaṃ mahāstraṃ śaraṃ hyupāsāniśitaṃ saṃdhīyata  MUṆḌ. UP. 2,2,3 . śrutīḥ  M. 6,29 .
— 2〉 m. ein Anhänger der Upaniṣad  Verz. d. B. H. No. 626 .

results.rendered_html:
aupaniṣada a. (dī f.) [upaniṣad-aṇ]
1 Contained or taught in an Upaniṣad; scriptural, theological.
2 Based or founded on, derived from, the Upaniṣads; aupaniṣadaṃ darśanaṃ (another name for Vedānta phil.)
— daḥ
1 The supreme soul, Brahman.
2 A follower of the doctrines of the Upaniṣads.
